_comment: Stage 5 schedule definitions. Hand-edited. main.py reads this and schedule_state.json to decide what is due. To add a job: add an entry here, and add a SUB_STAGE entry in main.py once the sub-stage exists. The 'priority' field controls run order when multiple jobs are due simultaneously (lower = runs first). Keys starting with underscore are ignored by main.py (used for comments or temporarily disabled jobs).
_disabled_comment: Renaming an entry to start with underscore disables it without losing the config — main.py skips underscore-prefixed keys. Useful when superseding a sub-stage and wanting easy rollback.

thesis_decomposition.description: Decompose candidate summaries into structured thesis claims. Runs whenever Stage 4 candidate_summaries.json is newer than the latest decomposition.

_disabled_hourly_watcher._disabled_reason: Superseded 2026-05-18 by the price-led `monitor` sub-stage below. State files preserved on disk untouched. To restore: rename this key back to `hourly_watcher` AND uncomment the matching SUB_STAGES entry in main.py.
_disabled_hourly_watcher.description: Monitor held 15 positions for urgent events. Polls Alpaca News + yfinance.

monitor.description: Price-led monitor (Stage 5 redesign). Runs 4x daily ET: 09:00 pre-open, 10:00 just-after-open, 15:30 just-before-close, 16:30 post-close. At post-close the universe expands from 15 held to all 50 candidates. Triggers pipeline rerun for tickers where price/volume signals cross thresholds AND LLM investigation concludes the thesis needs re-evaluation.

twice_daily_watcher.description: Monitor unselected 35 candidates from the top 50.

daily_run.description: Refresh Stage 1 scores, drain Tier 2 queue, run thesis integrity check.

weekly_run.description: Full pipeline rerun via orchestrator.py (Stages 1-4, including Stage 4's portfolio execution).
